Commons is a freely licensed media file repository. You can help.
Summary
Licensing
DescriptionSepang.svg
English: Track map for Sepang International Circuit.
Bahasa Melayu: Track peta untuk Litar Antarabangsa Sepang.
Date
31 July 2008
Source
Own work
Author
Will Pittenger
Other versions
Older PNG version - obsolete
SVG copy of Image:Circuit Sepang.png with less detail than this image
An SVG with little detail and a background that could interfere with some pages
Version of Image:GrandPrix Circuit Malaysia 2006.svg that highlights Turn 1
Simple PNG showing only the track layout - obsolete
JPEG showing some detail, but with more flourish than needed
Same as Image:Malaysiagprix.png
Camera location2° 45′ 39.2″ N, 101° 44′ 16.2″ E View this and other nearby images on: OpenStreetMap 2.760889; 101.737833
